questions.prompt: In flex-direction: column, which property centers items HORIZONTALLY?
questions.explanation: In column, the cross-axis is horizontal — so align-items handles horizontal alignment.

options: Wraps items to the next row
Reverses items on the main axis: right → left in LTR
Reverses the source order in the DOM
questions.explanation: row-reverse flips the direction items lay out, but doesn't touch the DOM.

questions.prompt: Stack these items vertically instead of horizontally.
